name: Alert
description: Add Proficiency Bonus to Initiative rolls. After rolling Initiative, swap yours with one willing ally's.

name: Magic Initiate
description: Learn two cantrips and one 1st-level spell from Cleric, Druid, or Wizard lists. Cast the spell once per Long Rest without a slot.

name: Savage Attacker
description: Once per turn when hitting with a weapon, roll the damage dice twice and use either result.

name: Skilled
description: Gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools. Repeatable.

name: Ability Score Improvement
description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two by 1 each. Cannot exceed 20. Repeatable.

name: Grappler
description: Increase STR or DEX by 1. Advantage against grappled creatures. Move grappled creatures without extra movement.

name: Archery
description: +2 bonus to attack rolls with Ranged weapons.

name: Defense
description: While wearing armor, gain +1 bonus to AC.

name: Great Weapon Fighting
description: When rolling damage with a Two-Handed or Versatile weapon, treat any 1 or 2 on a damage die as 3.

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
description: Add your ability modifier to the extra attack's damage with a Light weapon.

name: Boon of Combat Prowess
description: Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). When missing an attack, you can hit instead; resets next turn.

name: Boon of Dimensional Travel
description: Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). After Attack or Magic action, teleport up to 30 feet.

name: Boon of Fate
description: Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). Roll 2d4 to apply as bonus or penalty to a creature's d20 test within 60 feet.

name: Boon of Irresistible Offense
description: Increase STR or DEX by 1 (max 30). Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage ignores Resistance.

name: Boon of Spell Recall
description: Increase INT, WIS, or CHA by 1 (max 30). When casting level 1-4 spells, roll 1d4; if matching slot level, slot isn't expended.

name: Boon of the Night Spirit
description: Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). In Dim Light or Darkness, become Invisible as a Bonus Action. Resistance to all damage except Psychic and Radiant.

name: Boon of Truesight
description: Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). Gain Truesight 60 feet.
